title: Command Map Overlay Dock
summary: Compressed the Map stage playback and lane-focus overlays into compact HUD strips, hiding long copy and preserving selected path stats without covering the playable atlas board.
proof: Added tested Command Map overlay rules that shrink playback context into a top HUD strip.
Compressed the selected lane focus panel into a bottom dock with short title and stat chips, hiding long descriptive copy only in solo Map stage.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the overlay-dock unlock.
